MASTER TABLE FOR APPLICATION SYSTEM MAPPINGS AND CONFIGURATIONS. MAINTAINS RELATIONSHIPS BETWEEN APPLICATIONS AND THEIR SYSTEM CODES FOR CONFIGURATION MANAGEMENT.
DETAILED BREAKDOWN OF SQL STATEMENTS INTO ANALYZABLE COMPONENTS. ENABLES GRANULAR ANALYSIS OF SQL STATEMENT STRUCTURE AND DEPENDENCIES.
TRACKS DATABASE OBJECTS REFERENCED WITHIN SQL STATEMENTS. MAPS RELATIONSHIPS AND DEPENDENCIES BETWEEN DATABASE OBJECTS FOR IMPACT ANALYSIS.
MANAGES PACKAGE SOURCE FILE TRACKING AND STATUS. MONITORS THE EXISTENCE, LOCATION, AND USAGE STATUS OF PACKAGE SOURCE FILES.
CENTRAL REPOSITORY FOR PACKAGE METADATA AND STATUS TRACKING. STORES DETAILED INFORMATION ABOUT PACKAGE CONFIGURATIONS, STATUS, AND RELATIONSHIPS.
PRIMARY TABLE FOR SQL STATEMENT ANALYSIS AND TRACKING. STORES COMPLETE SQL STATEMENTS WITH THEIR METADATA FOR ANALYSIS AND MONITORING.
KOPI AV DBM.ORGNR_HOVEDNR FØR KJØRING AV OPPDATERING FRA FIL
LISTS AND MANAGES SCHEMAS THAT ARE PART OF THE APPLICATION. PROVIDES CENTRALIZED SCHEMA MANAGEMENT AND TRACKING.
MONITORS AND MANAGES DATABASE OBJECT LOCKS. PROVIDES DETAILED INFORMATION ABOUT LOCK STATUS, TYPE, AND RESOLUTION OPTIONS.
GENERATES RUNSTATS COMMANDS FOR UPDATING TABLE STATISTICS
GENERATES CREATE TABLE STATEMENTS FOR EXISTING TABLES
GENERATES DDL STATEMENTS FOR PRIMARY KEY CONSTRAINTS. FACILITATES SCHEMA REPLICATION AND DOCUMENTATION.
SHOWS SQL STATEMENTS FROM RECENTLY USED PACKAGES
GENERATES SCRIPTS TO TERMINATE GROUPED LOCKS
GENERATES DROP STATEMENTS FOR DATABASE OBJECTS
IDENTIFIES DATABASE VIEWS THAT ARE NOT REFERENCED IN ANY ANALYZED SQL STATEMENTS, HELPING IDENTIFY POTENTIALLY UNUSED VIEWS
VALIDATES STATEMENT HASH CONSISTENCY BY IDENTIFYING CASES WHERE IDENTICAL HASHES HAVE DIFFERENT STATEMENT CHARACTERISTICS
COMPARES SOURCE CODE DIFFERENCES ACROSS ENVIRONMENTS BY ANALYZING STATEMENT HASHES AND DDL TIMESTAMPS
LISTS TABLES THAT HAVE BEEN ACCESSED WITHIN THE LAST 3 YEARS, USEFUL FOR DB2 V11.5 MIGRATION PLANNING
IDENTIFIES ACTIVE PACKAGES THAT ARE MISSING THEIR COBOL SOURCE FILES, HELPING TRACK SOURCE CODE MANAGEMENT ISSUES
ANALYZES PACKAGE USAGE PATTERNS BASED ON TABLE ACCESS HISTORY AND EXPLICIT USAGE FLAGS TO IDENTIFY POTENTIALLY UNUSED PACKAGES
